label: 1549 CE
era_summary: Year 1549 (MDXLIX) was a common year starting on Tuesday of the Julian calendar. In the Kingdom of England, it was known as "The Year of the Many-Headed Monster", because of the unusually high number of rebellions which occurred in the country.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1549: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1549: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61. Maddison records GDP/capita 1362 (PRT, 1549) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
